executives.name: Devinder Randhawa
executives.background: Mr. Randhawa is an experienced CEO and founder of several successful exploration companies. He was the founder and CEO of Fission Energy Corp. and Fission Uranium Corp. He has a background in finance and has been involved in the resource sector for over 35 years.

executives.name: Raymond Ashley
executives.background: Mr. Ashley has over 35 years of experience in the mineral exploration industry. He was formerly the Vice President, Exploration of Fission Uranium Corp. and Fission Energy Corp. He has been involved in several major uranium discoveries in the Athabasca Basin.

executives.name: Ryan Woodhouse
executives.background: Mr. Woodhouse has over 15 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in financial reporting and corporate compliance. He has served as CFO for several public companies in the resource sector.

executives.name: Samir Patel
executives.background: Mr. Patel is a corporate and securities lawyer with over 15 years of experience in the resource sector. He has served as General Counsel and Corporate Secretary for several public companies.

board_of_directors.name: Devinder Randhawa
board_of_directors.background: Founder and CEO of F3 Uranium Corp. with extensive experience in the uranium sector.

board_of_directors.name: Raymond Ashley
board_of_directors.background: President of F3 Uranium Corp. and experienced geologist.

board_of_directors.name: Nicky Grant
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Grant has over 25 years of experience in the financial services and resource sectors. She has held senior positions in corporate finance and investor relations.

board_of_directors.name: William Marsh
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Marsh is a professional geologist with over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at major mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Kusmirski
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Kusmirski has over 45 years of experience in the exploration industry and was formerly the President of JNR Resources Inc.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Board of Directors Page
